conventions.scope: [1B.4] hand-labeled golden fixtures for the Orca Whirlpool handler ([1B.3]). Raw txs live in raw/<txHash>.json as full raw_txs rows (jsonParsed getTransaction payload).
conventions.logIndex: Zero-based index of the source instruction in the flattened sequence (each outer instruction followed by its inner CPI instructions, in order — mirrors flattenTransactionResponse from solana-tx-parser-public). Events derived from a Whirlpool instruction carry that instruction's flat index.
conventions.emissionSeq: Zero-based ordinal among the events emitted for one source instruction, in inner-transfer order (token A leg before token B leg). Zero-amount legs are skipped and do not consume an ordinal.
conventions.asset: SPL mint address verbatim (wrapped SOL = So11111111111111111111111111111111111111112; no unwrap to native SOL at handler level). Native SOL is only used by ingest-time gas events.
conventions.amounts: Raw integer base units as decimal strings; the test parses them to bigint.
conventions.positionId: solana:orca_whirlpool:<position PDA address>. The position PDA (not the NFT mint) is the only identifier present in every lifecycle instruction's accounts (openPosition* acct[2], increase/decreaseLiquidity acct[3], increase/decreaseLiquidity V2 acct[5], collectFees/collectReward[V2] acct[2], closePosition* acct[2]). The NFT mint derives the PDA one-way when needed (e.g. NFT transfers).

instructionMapping.openPosition / openPositionWithMetadata: one lp_deposit:open_position event, no amounts (lifecycle marker; NFT mint + rent are not principal)
instructionMapping.increaseLiquidity / increaseLiquidityV2: one lp_deposit:add_liquidity per non-zero token leg, sent side only
instructionMapping.decreaseLiquidity / decreaseLiquidityV2: one lp_withdraw:remove_liquidity per non-zero token leg, received side only
instructionMapping.collectFees / collectFeesV2: one lp_fee:collect per non-zero token leg, received side only
instructionMapping.collectReward / collectRewardV2: one lp_reward:emission_claim per non-zero leg, received side only — zero-amount reward transfers (all of this wallet's history) emit NOTHING
instructionMapping.closePosition / closePositionWithTokenEx: one lp_withdraw:close_position event, no amounts (NFT burn + rent refund are not principal)
instructionMapping.swap / swapV2: one swap:trade event with both sides (sent = user->vault leg, received = vault->user leg)
instructionMapping.twoHopSwap / twoHopSwapV2: one swap:trade event with net sides (input of hop 1, output of hop 2); the intermediate token nets to zero and is not emitted

conventions.ephemeralWsol: Temp WSOL accounts (createAccount + initializeAccount before, closeAccount after the Whirlpool ix) are plumbing — the handler reads amounts from the SPL transfer legs only and emits no wrap/unwrap events.
conventions.v1TransferMintResolution: spl-token:transfer (V1 instructions) carries no mint — resolve via meta.pre/postTokenBalances account->mint mapping; transferChecked (V2) carries the mint inline.
conventions.handler: handlerId must be 'orca_whirlpool' on every event; handlerVersion is not asserted.
notCovered: Position NFT transfer between wallets: no position mint in this wallet's history was ever transferred; no foreign example findable without an indexer (Whirlpool program is not an account of such txs). Revisit in [1B.3]/[1D].

Non-zero collectReward: all 93 own CollectReward transfers AND ~900 sampled recent foreign Whirlpool txs have zero-amount reward transfers (emissions inactive program-wide). The zero-amount no-emit behavior is pinned by fixtures #6-#8; the non-zero path (lp_reward:emission_claim) remains unexercised.

Single-tx rebalance (decrease+collect+close+open+increase in one tx): does not occur in this history — the Orca UI rebalances as a close tx followed by an open tx (fixtures #0/#1 and #4/#5/#9 cover the pieces). Cross-tx rebalance linking is phase-3 aggregation work.
Position bundles, locked positions, repositionLiquidityV2: never used by this wallet.
conventions.layout: Layout divergence (documented, accepted): solana splits raw payloads into raw/<signature>.json plus this single manifest of expectations; base and sui use one self-describing <protocol>-NN-<description>.json per tx with raw payload + expected events inline. New Solana fixtures should converge on the per-tx convention used by base/sui.

fixtures.notes: OpenPositionWithTokenExtensions@3 mints position NFT (PDA 6TuVg96n..., mint 8JtDVULA...); IncreaseLiquidity@21 deposits WSOL (leg @22, V1 transfer, mint via token balances) + USDC (leg @23). Ephemeral WSOL account wraps 127.956 SOL at @19, leftover unwrapped at @24.

fixtures.case: open + increaseV2 single-sided (WSOL/hSOL, token A leg is zero)
fixtures.notes: OpenPositionWithTokenExtensions@3 (PDA 2qVGGt81...); IncreaseLiquidityV2@21 with transferChecked legs: WSOL @22 amount 0 (omitted — single-sided deposit), hSOL @23. Pins the zero-leg-skip rule.
Standalone IncreaseLiquidity@5 on position 7fP3EJrj... opened in an earlier tx; legs @6 WSOL (V1 transfer) and @7 USDC.
Standalone DecreaseLiquidity@5 on position 84VVGAnh... which stays open (same position is harvested later in fixture #6). Legs @6 WSOL, @7 USDC, received side.

fixtures.case: full close: decrease + collectFees + closePosition in one tx
fixtures.notes: DecreaseLiquidity@3 (legs @4/@5), CollectFees@6 (legs @7/@8, tiny amounts), ClosePositionWithTokenExtensions@9 (NFT burn @10, no amounts). Position PDA 2emqYEnj..., pool 3ThdFZQK.../6FrrzDk5... pair.

fixtures.case: full close V2, single-sided decrease + two-sided fees (WSOL/hSOL)
fixtures.notes: DecreaseLiquidityV2@5 with WSOL leg @6 amount 0 (omitted) and hSOL leg @7; CollectFeesV2@8 with both legs non-zero (@9 WSOL, @10 hSOL); ClosePositionWithTokenExtensions@11. Position PDA EteUdG68....

fixtures.case: harvest: fee + reward same tx, reward transfer is zero (SOL/USDC)
fixtures.notes: UpdateFeesAndRewards@3 (no event), CollectFees@6 (legs @7 WSOL, @8 USDC), CollectReward@9 with zero-amount ORCA transfer @10 (no event). Same position 84VVGAnh... as fixture #3.

fixtures.case: harvest V2 fees + two zero-amount collectReward instructions (WSOL/hSOL)
fixtures.notes: CollectFeesV2@6 (transferChecked legs @7 WSOL, @8 hSOL); CollectReward@9 and CollectReward@11 both move 0 ORCA (no events). Position PDA DLZi68Zs....

fixtures.case: two positions harvested in one tx (SOL/USDC pool)
fixtures.notes: Update+CollectFees+CollectReward(0) twice: position 9JFyT7oo... at @6 (legs @7/@8) and position 8eKMieua... at @12 (legs @13/@14). Events must split by positionId. Rewards zero (no events).

fixtures.case: close without collectFees, single-sided decrease (out-of-range close)
fixtures.notes: DecreaseLiquidity@5 with WSOL leg @6 amount 0 (omitted) and USDC leg @7; ClosePositionWithTokenExtensions@8, no CollectFees ix. Same position 8eKMieua... as fixture #8, closed 93s after the harvest — together they pin a cross-tx rebalance-style lifecycle.

fixtures.case: single swap USDC -> WSOL (direct, not via aggregator)
fixtures.notes: Swap@5: user pays USDC (leg @6, user ATA -> vault), receives WSOL (leg @7, vault -> ephemeral WSOL account, unwrapped at @8). One swap:trade event with both sides; no positionId.

fixtures.case: twoHopSwap USDC -> USDT -> WSOL collapsed to one trade
fixtures.notes: TwoHopSwap@10 with four legs: @11 user USDC out, @12 USDT to user (intermediate), @13 user USDT out (intermediate, nets to zero with @12 modulo rounding), @14 WSOL to user. One swap:trade with net input/output; intermediate USDT (Es9vMFrz...) not emitted.

Real own tx: IncreaseLiquidityByTokenAmountsV2 (a token-amount-specified liquidity add, same account layout + CPI transfer legs as IncreaseLiquidityV2 — position account at index 5). Previously unhandled -> whole tx unclassified -> the open SOL/USDC position 9WKtW4Ny lost its deposited basis. Two deposit legs (WSOL then USDC) into the pool vaults.
